column1: A single continuous shot in a modern living room. A man sits on a sofa and clearly says, <S>I am watching the game now.<E> Behind him, a large television is playing a loud soccer match with crowd cheering and referee whistles. The man is visible from head to waist, his face is well lit, and his lip motion follows his speech. Stable camera, no cuts. <AUDCAP>Clear male speech, soccer crowd cheering, referee whistles, and television commentary.<ENDAUDCAP>
